# Json House
> Structured AI/LLM data resource for developers and power users.

## About
This blog publishes structured, data-driven posts about AI models, developer tools, prompt engineering, and AI productivity. All posts include JSON-LD schema and machine-readable data blocks.

## Data
- [All posts JSON](https://www.jsonhouse.com/api/posts.json): Full structured post index with metadata
- [Dataset index](https://www.jsonhouse.com/data/index.json): Index of all per-post structured datasets (auto-generated)
- Per-post datasets: https://www.jsonhouse.com/data/{slug}.json — comparison tables, timelines, key statistics

## Current Datasets
- [google-ai-content-penalties-2026](https://www.jsonhouse.com/data/google-ai-content-penalties-2026.json): Google AI content policy enforcement criteria by platform
- [youtube-ai-monetization-2026](https://www.jsonhouse.com/data/youtube-ai-monetization-2026.json): YouTube inauthentic content policy and enforcement tiers
- [eeat-ai-content-2026](https://www.jsonhouse.com/data/eeat-ai-content-2026.json): E-E-A-T signals and quality evaluation framework
- [synthid-c2pa-explained-2026](https://www.jsonhouse.com/data/synthid-c2pa-explained-2026.json): SynthID vs C2PA comparison, tool support, verification workflow

## Categories
- AI Models & Intelligence: /category/ai-models/ — LLM comparisons, benchmarks, releases
- AI Developer Tools: /category/ai-developer-tools/ — APIs, coding tools, Claude Code, Cursor
- Prompt Engineering: /category/prompt-engineering/ — Libraries, templates, system prompts
- AI Productivity: /category/ai-productivity/ — Workflow automation, templates
- AI Data & Statistics: /category/ai-data/ — Adoption data, market research
- AI Safety & Ethics: /category/ai-safety/ — Hallucination prevention, practical safety

## Topic Clusters
- CLUSTER_LLM: Best LLM comparisons, pricing, coding benchmarks
- CLUSTER_DEVTOOLS: Best AI coding tools, Claude Code, Cursor vs Copilot, MCP
- CLUSTER_PROMPTS: Ultimate prompt libraries by job role, system prompts

## Update Frequency
- Posts: 3x/week (Monday, Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday)
- Pricing data: weekly (every Monday)
- Benchmarks: monthly

## Post Formats
- FORMAT_A: Tool comparison (JSON data block)
- FORMAT_B: Prompt library (copy-ready prompts)
- FORMAT_C: Technical guide (step-by-step with code)
- FORMAT_D: Structured data resource (tables + JSON)
- FORMAT_E: Workflow/template (downloadable)
- FORMAT_F: Benchmark report (tested data)
- FORMAT_G: Weekly AI digest (automated)

## API Access
- /api/posts.json — post index (title, url, date, categories, tags, description)
- /data/index.json — dataset manifest (slug, url, data_updated for each post dataset)
- /data/{YYYY-MM-DD-slug}.json — full structured data per post (comparison tables, statistics, timelines)
